zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Drake於大約1388年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯德拉可斯托時，她的父親Lord John Drake28歲，母親Mrs. Lord John Drake24歲。她於1422年之前與Christopher Barnewall在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯特利姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1446年10月12日享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda Drake于大约1388年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯德拉可斯托时，她的父亲Lord John Drake28岁，母亲Mrs. Lord John Drake24岁。她于1422年之前与Christopher Barnewall在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯特利姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1446年10月12日享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Drake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English drake, either ‘drake, male duck’ (compare Duck ) or ‘dragon’ (Old English draca ‘snake, dragon’ or the cognate Old Norse draki), including an emblematic dragon on a flag (compare Dragon ). Both the Old English and the Old Norse forms are from Latin draco ‘snake, monster’; its sense as a nickname is unclear but it may have had the sense ‘standard bearer’. The name was taken to Ireland in the 13th century and reinforced by later English settlers in the 17th century.
German: from Low German drake ‘dragon’, familiar as image on signboards, hence a topographic or habitational name referring to a house or inn with such signboard.
Dutch: variant, mostly Americanized and Flemish, of Draak, a cognate of 2 above, from draak (Middle Dutch drake) ‘dragon’.

variants.name: Duck
meanings: Irish: adoption of the English name (see 1 above) as an equivalent of Lohan (an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Leocháin ‘descendant of Leochán’) by mistranslation, as if from lacha ‘duck’.
North German (also Dück) and German (Dück): see Dueck .

variants.name: Drakes
meanings: English: variant of Drake , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

English: habitational name from Drax (Yorkshire). The placename probably derives from Old English dræg ‘portage, place where boats are dragged’ or dræg ‘drag net’, influenced by Old Norse drag ‘portage’, with a plural drages being shortened to drags, Drax.
In some cases perhaps an Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) cognate in some other language.

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Drake was born about 1388, in Drakestown, County Meath, Ireland, her father, Lord John Drake, was 28 and her mother, Mrs. Lord John Drake, was 24. She married Christopher Barnewall before 1422, in Trim, County Meath, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 12 October 1446, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Drake est née environ 1388, à Drakestown, County Meath, Irlande, son père, Lord John Drake, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Lord John Drake, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Christopher Barnewall avant 1422, à Trim, County Meath, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 octobre 1446, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda Drake um 1388 in Drakestown, County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord John Drake 28 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Lord John Drake 24. Sie hat vor 1422 in Trim, County Meath, Irland Christopher Barnewall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Oktober 1446 im Alter von 59 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Drake è nata il circa 1388 nel Drakestown, County Meath, Irlanda, sua padre, Lord John Drake, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Lord John Drake, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Christopher Barnewall prima del 1422, nel Trim, County Meath, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 ottobre 1446, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Drakeが約1388年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスドラケストウンで生まれた時，父Lord John Drakeは28歳，母Mrs. Lord John Drakeは24歳であった。1422年以前にアイルランドコウントイ メアストリムでChristopher Barnewallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1446年10月12日に59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Drake(이)가 대략 1388년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 드라케스타운에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord John Drake(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Lord John Drake(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1422년 이전 아일랜드 카운티 미스 트림에서 Christopher Barnewall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1446년 10월 12일 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda Drake родилась около 1388 г. в местности дрекестоун, коунти мит, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Lord John Drake было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Lord John Drake, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Christopher Barnewall перед 1422 г. в местности трим, коунти мит, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 12 октября 1446 г. в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda Drake nació aproximadamente 1388, en Drakestown, County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Lord John Drake, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mrs. Lord John Drake, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Christopher Barnewall antes de 1422, en Trim, County Meath, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1446, a la edad de 59 años.
